title: Standardize dropdown popover styling and polish editor block insertion palette
description: Address feedback from avaliacao-interface.md (items 1 and 2): dropdown popovers currently use inconsistent font styling, harsh black outer borders, and unstandardized padding/shadows (dropdown.png), while the editor block handles insertion menu lacks visual refinement (dropdown-conteudo.png). Standardize Radix DropdownMenuContent, SelectContent, and PopoverContent components across the admin application to use standard font-sans typography, subtle borders (border-border / border-zinc-200/80 instead of harsh black borders), soft shadows (shadow-md/shadow-lg), and clean item hover states. Polish the editor block insertion palette in BlockHandles.tsx and blockInsert.ts to present structured block options with clean typography, icon alignment, and elegant category headings matching the editorial design system.
acceptanceCriteria: Radix DropdownMenuContent, SelectContent, and PopoverContent components inherit font-sans and standard admin typography without font family mismatches
Harsh black outer borders around popovers and dropdown menus are replaced with subtle, elegant border styling (border-border or border-zinc-200/80) and soft shadows

The editor block insertion palette in BlockHandles.tsx (grouped TEXTO/TÍTULOS/LISTAS/BLOCOS) is polished visually with clean item spacing, icon alignment, refined hover states, and subtle border/background styling
Dropdown menu items across the header, sidebar context actions, editor tabs, and block handles maintain consistent visual hierarchy, padding, and hover/active states
Keyboard navigation, focus rings, and screen-reader accessibility inside dropdowns and popovers remain fully functional

steps.description: Audit and update global dropdown and popover styles
steps.details: Update apps/admin/src/index.css and shadcn UI primitives to ensure font-sans is explicitly inherited, outer borders use border-border or subtle zinc tokens instead of solid black, and popovers carry consistent shadow-md/lg shadow styling.

steps.description: Standardize dropdown menu items across the admin shell
steps.details: Refine item spacing, hover states, and typography for dropdown menus across AppHeader.tsx, SidebarTree.tsx, and RowActionsMenu.tsx.

steps.description: Polish the content editor block insertion palette
steps.details: Update BlockHandles.tsx and blockInsert.ts to format grouped block choices cleanly with consistent icons, uppercase group titles, and elegant hover effects.

steps.description: Verify in browser against reference screenshots
steps.details: Build and load the admin app, opening dropdowns in header, sidebar, and editor to verify typography consistency, elegant borders, and clean block insertion palette.

technicalNotes: Ensure font-sans is explicitly set or inherited on Radix portals so popovers don't fall back to browser default fonts.
Keep border colors subtle using theme variables (border-border or border-neutral-200) instead of raw black borders.
